example: Everybody's so punk on the internet.
zh: 龐克，這裡指叛逆或粗魯的態度
ja: パンク、ここでは反抗的または粗野な態度を指す

example: Every joke's just trolling and memes.
zh: 網路上故意挑釁或激怒他人的行為
ja: インターネット上で意図的に挑発や怒らせる行為

example: Everybody's cutthroat in the comments.
zh: 殘酷無情的，競爭激烈的
ja: 冷酷で容赦ない、競争が激しい

example: I have been afflicted by a terminal uniqueness.
zh: 終極的獨特性，指極端的自我獨特感
ja: 究極の独自性、極端な自己独自感を指す

example: But I'm not a bad bitch and this isn't savage.
zh: 強勢且有自信的女性（俚語）
ja: 強くて自信のある女性（スラング）

example: But I'm not a bad bitch and this isn't savage.
ja: 野蛮な、無情な

example: I'm never gonna leave you out so many traitors.
ja: 裏切り者

example: Smooth operate ours, but I'm never gonna break that bar.
ja: 操作する、運営する

example: Pretty soon I learned cautious discretion.
ja: 慎重な判断力

example: When your first crush is something kind.
ja: 初恋、片思い

example: When I said I don't believe in marriage, that was a lie.
ja: 結婚

example: Every eldest daughter was the first lamb to the slaughter.
ja: 長女

example: Every eldest daughter was the first lamb to the slaughter.
zh: 比喻無辜或毫無防備地面對危險的人
ja: 無防備に危険に直面する人の比喩

example: So we all dressed up as wolves and we all defy.
zh: 狼，這裡比喻強悍或叛逆的人
ja: オオカミ、ここでは強くて反抗的な人の比喩

example: We lie back, a beautiful, beautiful time lapse.
ja: 横になる、リラックスする

example: We lie back, a beautiful, beautiful time lapse.
zh: 縮時攝影，時間流逝的快速呈現
ja: タイムラプス、時間の経過を早送りで見せる映像技法

example: There are spills, kisses and lollocks.
ja: こぼれること

example: There are spills, kisses and lollocks.
ja: キス

example: Shimmers that innocent lie back.
ja: 無邪気な、無実の

example: Every youngest child felt they were raised up in the wild.
zh: 在野外長大，比喻自由或不受約束地成長
ja: 野生で育てられた、自由で束縛されない成長の比喩
